summary: Completed comprehensive testing of delivery route optimization application. Backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with excellent integration.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status code 200 instead of 201 for create operations
Geocoding fails for fake test addresses
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - real addresses work correctly

passed_tests: Dashboard statistics display correctly (21 pedidos, 4 motoboys, 1 entrega, 5.50 km)
Order registration form with auto-fill start time (1 hour before end time)
Delivery driver registration with avatar selection
Route optimization using OSRM with map visualization
Leaflet map integration with route display and markers
Order assignment to drivers with dropdown selection
History tracking and filtering by driver
CRUD operations for orders and drivers
Dark theme design with blue accents

success_percentage.backend: 93% (13/14 tests passed - only geocoding fake address failed as expected)
